comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
criu is broken on debian as they miss patches for the newer kernels
I reported https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=1142043 for the debian criu issue
